home.deliveryHeading: We are available on Uber Eats and DoorDash
home.statsReviews: Reviews (Most reviewed restaurant chain in Canada)
home.montrealServing: Masakali Indian Cuisine is now serving in Montreal.
home.experienceDesc: Reserve your table at any of our locations. Whether it's a romantic dinner, family celebration, or business meeting, we have the perfect setting for you.
home.planningEventDesc: Let Masakali cater your next event with authentic Indian cuisine. From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations.

about.heroDesc: What began as a dream in 2021 has grown into one of Canada's most exciting Indian restaurant groups. Masakali is more than a restaurant — it's a celebration of culture, flavor, and community.
about.glimpseDesc: Where tradition meets artistry — discover the essence of Masakali
about.comeBePartOfStory: Come Be a Part of Our Story
about.timeline2021Desc: Masakali Indian Cuisine opens its first location in Stittsville, Ottawa, bringing authentic Indian flavors to the community.
about.timeline2022Desc: Expanding to Wellington Street, Ottawa. Launch of RangDe Indian Cuisine at 700 March Rd.
about.timeline2023Desc: Masakali Restobar opens in the vibrant Byward Market, offering a modern fusion dining experience.
about.timeline2024Desc: Masakali arrives in Montreal, bringing our signature flavors to Quebec.
about.timeline2025Desc: Masakali launches in Cupertino, California, USA — our first international location in the heart of Silicon Valley.
about.timeline2026Desc: Launch of unified digital platform for all locations. Building the future of Masakali Restaurant Group.
about.brandMasakaliDesc: Our flagship brand serving authentic Indian cuisine across Ottawa, Montreal, and Cupertino, California.
about.brandRestobarDesc: A modern Indian fusion experience at 97 Clarence St., Byward Market, Ottawa.
about.brandRangDeDesc: Vibrant and colorful Indian dining at 700 March Rd Unit H, Kanata.

menu.menuDesc: Discover our carefully curated menu featuring authentic Indian dishes, from classic curries to innovative creations.
menu.noDishesFound: No dishes found matching your filters.

reservations.heroDesc: Book your dining experience at any Masakali location. Instant confirmation with email notification.

catering.heroDesc: From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations — let Masakali bring the finest Indian cuisine to your event.
catering.formDesc: Fill in your event details and we'll get back to you with a custom quote.
catering.teamWillContact: Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

contact.heroDesc: Have a question, feedback, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formDesc: Fill in the form below and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

locations.heroDesc: Browse all branches grouped by country.

manageReservations.heroDesc: Enter the same email and phone number used during booking. Your reservation list will be shown from newest to oldest.
manageReservations.phoneVerifyNote: We automatically verify as country code 1 + your 10 digits.
manageReservations.noReservationsFound: No reservations found for this email and phone combination.

footer.brandDesc: Premium Indian cuisine across multiple locations. Experience the rich flavors of India, crafted with passion since 2021.
footer.copyright: Masakali Restaurant Group. All rights reserved.
